bead.title: install/update: --global surface installs to agent-tier paths (install-to-agent)
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a)

Operators who want a single per-machine skill install (the common case) need `ddx install <name> --global` to write the plugin into the machine-wide tree and link it into the agent-tier skill paths every harness reads, and `ddx update --global` to refresh only that tree. Without a --global surface, the install must be repeated per project.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/cmd/install.go:49 registers the `--global` flag; install.go:99 resolveInstallDirs(global) (defined install.go:180) must set installRoot = ddxroot.GlobalDir() (install.go:182) and the agent-tier skill dirs (~/.claude/skills, ~/.agents/skills) when global is true; install.go:446 must set pluginDir = filepath.Join(ddxroot.GlobalDir(), "plugins", name) for local installs; install.go:105 selectInstallState(global) must route to registry.LoadGlobalState/SaveGlobalState (install.go:202-203).
- cli/cmd/update.go:66 must dispatch to performGlobalUpdate (update.go:300) when opts.Global is set; performGlobalUpdate installs exclusively into ddxroot.GlobalDir() (update.go:337) and persists via registry.SaveGlobalState (update.go:345), never touching the project tree.
- Before this surface, install.go/update.go targeted ddxroot.Path() unconditionally, so no machine-wide install or update existed.

PROPOSED FIX
1. `ddx install <name> --global` resolves the target to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/, writes the plugin content there, records it in the global install state, and creates symlinks (or OS-dependent copies) under ~/.claude/skills/<name> and ~/.agents/skills/<name> so a fresh shell discovers the skill.
2. `ddx update --global` checks for and applies newer versions of globally installed plugins against ddxroot.GlobalDir() ONLY, leaving every project tree untouched.

NON-SCOPE
- Does NOT remove the per-project (no-flag) install path (handled in the install-in-project child).
- Does NOT migrate legacy ~/.config/ddx paths.
- Does NOT add agent-harness skill paths beyond Claude Code (~/.claude/skills) and Codex (~/.agents/skills).
- Plugin lookup precedence at runtime is owned by the registry-resolver child.

DEPS
ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution) — global install paths route through ddxroot.GlobalDir(). Governing epic: ddx-602ae31a (Principle 2).
bead.acceptance:
1. `ddx install <name> --global --silent` installs the plugin to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/ and creates a symlink or copy under ~/.claude/skills/<name> and ~/.agents/skills/<name>; covered by a Test* in cli/cmd/install_global_test.go.
2. TestUpdateGlobal_UpdatesGlobalNotProject asserts `ddx update --global` updates only the machine-wide global plugin tree (ddxroot.GlobalDir()) and leaves the project tree unmodified.
3. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... ./internal/registry/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
